description.purpose: Test successful registration of a new business customer with complete commercial information.
description.relevant_policies: A new customer can be registered only if all mandatory company data is provided and there is no duplicate RUC.
description.notes: The user is willing to confirm all details before registration.

user_scenario.persona: Professional and efficient. You want onboarding done quickly but correctly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to register your company as a new wholesale customer.
instructions.known_info: Your company is Maritech Frozen Foods SAC. RUC: 20100000006. Billing address fields: street Av. Industrial 410, district Callao, city Callao, state Callao, country Peru, postal code 07001. Shipping address fields: street Deposito Frio 12, district Callao, city Callao, state Callao, country Peru, postal code 07001. Incoterm: FOB. Payment method: bank_transfer. Payment terms: 30 days. Shipping lead time: 6 days. Currency: USD. Preferred destination port: Callao. Contact person fields: full name Sofia Mendez, role Procurement Supervisor, email sofia@mari-tech.pe, phone +51-999-222-006.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to register your company and proactively provide the complete registration data in canonical field-by-field form, including billing address fields, shipping address fields, preferred destination port, and contact details. If the agent summarizes the information and asks for confirmation, say yes.

ticket: Register a new customer company named Maritech Frozen Foods SAC with full company, payment, and logistics details.

actions.name: register_customer
actions.info: Register the new business customer using the provided company data.

nl_assertions: The agent confirms that the customer company was registered successfully.

description.purpose: Test that the agent can show the active product catalog.
description.relevant_policies: Only products that are active and present in the catalog may be offered.

user_scenario.persona: Curious but practical. You want to see what products are currently available to buy.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to understand the currently available seafood catalog before placing an order.
instructions.known_info: You represent Pacific Fresh Imports SAC.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to show the commercial catalog and summarize the available products.

ticket: Show the active fish product catalog to the customer.

nl_assertions: The agent should present or summarize the active product catalog without inventing unavailable items.

description.purpose: Test that the agent checks stock and correctly reports an out-of-stock product.
description.relevant_policies: The agent must not promise availability when stock is insufficient or unavailable.

user_scenario.persona: Direct and numbers-oriented. You want a clear answer on immediate availability.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to know if Tilapia Whole Round is available right now.
instructions.known_info: You are calling from Andes Seafood Distribution EIRL and want immediate stock confirmation for product PROD-007.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent whether product PROD-007 is available and wait for a clear stock answer.

ticket: Check stock for product PROD-007 and inform the customer that it is not available if stock is zero.

actions.name: check_stock
actions.info: Check inventory for the out-of-stock product.

nl_assertions: The agent should clearly state that the product is currently out of stock or unavailable.

description.purpose: Test a successful order registration for an active customer with sufficient stock.
description.relevant_policies: Orders may be registered only for active customers, active products, valid prices, and sufficient stock.
description.notes: The user is willing to confirm the final order details.

user_scenario.persona: Organized and decisive. You already know what you want to order.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to place a new order for Pacific Fresh Imports SAC.
instructions.known_info: Customer id: CUST-001. You want 100 kg of PROD-001 at USD 8.3 per kg, delivery on 2026-04-05, using the default shipping address and payment terms.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to place the order. If the agent summarizes the details and asks for confirmation, say yes.

ticket: Register a new order for customer CUST-001 for 100 kg of product PROD-001 at USD 8.3 per kg with delivery date 2026-04-05.

actions.name: register_order
actions.info: Create the order for the active customer using a valid negotiated price.

nl_assertions: The agent confirms that the order was registered successfully.

description.purpose: Test successful modification of a confirmed order before shipment.
description.relevant_policies: An order can be modified only if it has not been shipped, delivered, or cancelled.
description.notes: Uses ORD-010, which is confirmed and still modifiable.

user_scenario.persona: Careful and detail-focused. You want to adjust a recent order before dispatch.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to modify a recently created order before it ships.
instructions.known_info: You are Andes Seafood Distribution EIRL. Order id: ORD-010. You want to keep the fish burger patties line unchanged but reduce squid rings from 95 kg to 80 kg and change the delivery date to 2026-04-07.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to modify order ORD-010. If the agent summarizes the changes and asks for confirmation, say yes.

ticket: Modify order ORD-010 so the squid rings line is reduced to 80 kg and the delivery date becomes 2026-04-07.

actions.name: get_order_status
actions.info: Review the current order details before modifying.

actions.name: modify_order
actions.info: Modify the confirmed order before shipment.

nl_assertions: The agent confirms that the order was modified successfully.

description.purpose: Test successful cancellation of a recent order that is still eligible for cancellation.
description.relevant_policies: An order may be cancelled only if it is not shipped, delivered, already cancelled, or older than 10 days.
description.notes: Uses ORD-009, which was issued recently and is still confirmed.

user_scenario.persona: Brief and decisive. You want to stop a recent order before it moves forward.

instructions.reason_for_call: You need to cancel a recent order because your warehouse forecast changed.
instructions.known_info: You are Pacific Fresh Imports SAC. Order id: ORD-009. Cancellation reason: customer no longer needs the product this week.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to cancel order ORD-009. If the agent summarizes the cancellation and asks for confirmation, say yes.

ticket: Cancel recent order ORD-009 because the customer no longer needs the product this week.

arguments.reason: Customer no longer needs the product this week.

nl_assertions: The agent confirms that the order was cancelled successfully.

description.purpose: Test that the agent refuses to cancel an order older than 10 calendar days.
description.relevant_policies: Orders older than 10 days must not be cancelled directly by the agent and require escalation.
description.notes: Uses ORD-002, which is more than 10 days old on the policy date.

user_scenario.persona: Insistent. You want the cancellation approved even though the order is not recent anymore.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to cancel an old order because your sales plan changed.
instructions.known_info: You are Pacific Fresh Imports SAC. Order id: ORD-002.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to cancel order ORD-002. If the agent says it cannot do that directly, insist once and ask if there is any exception.

ticket: Refuse direct cancellation of order ORD-002 because it is older than 10 days.

actions.name: get_order_status
actions.info: Verify the order details before deciding.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse to cancel the order directly and indicate that human review is required.

description.purpose: Test that the agent refuses to cancel an order that has already been shipped.
description.relevant_policies: Shipped or delivered orders cannot be cancelled by the agent.
description.notes: Uses ORD-004, which already has a shipment in transit.

user_scenario.persona: Urgent and somewhat frustrated. You want the shipment stopped immediately.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to cancel an export order that is already in motion.
instructions.known_info: You are BlueWave Foods LLC. Order id: ORD-004.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to cancel the order immediately. If the agent refuses, ask whether it can at least explain why.

ticket: Do not cancel shipped order ORD-004.

actions.name: get_order_status
actions.info: Review the order and shipment status.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse the cancellation because the order has already been shipped.

description.purpose: Test that the agent can report order, shipment, and invoice status together.
description.relevant_policies: Order status responses should distinguish clearly between commercial order status, shipment status, and invoice status.
description.notes: Uses ORD-004 with an in-transit shipment and a paid invoice.

user_scenario.persona: Busy and concise. You want the essential status update only.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to know where your export order stands right now.
instructions.known_info: You are BlueWave Foods LLC. Order id: ORD-004.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent for the full status of order ORD-004, including logistics and invoice situation.

ticket: Provide the combined commercial, logistics, and invoice status for order ORD-004.

nl_assertions: The agent should explain that the order is shipped, the shipment is in transit, and the invoice is already paid.

description.purpose: Test successful invoice issuance for a confirmed order that has no invoice yet.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may issue an invoice only if the order exists, is not cancelled, and does not already have an invoice.
description.notes: Uses ORD-009, which has no invoice in the base DB.

user_scenario.persona: Formal and process-driven. You want billing completed now.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want an invoice issued for a confirmed order.
instructions.known_info: You are Pacific Fresh Imports SAC. Order id: ORD-009.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to issue the invoice for order ORD-009. If the agent summarizes the action and asks for confirmation, say yes.

ticket: Issue an invoice for order ORD-009.

actions.name: get_order_status
actions.info: Check that the order has no invoice yet.

actions.name: issue_invoice
actions.info: Issue the invoice for the confirmed order.

nl_assertions: The agent confirms that the invoice was issued successfully.

description.purpose: Test that the agent refuses to issue a duplicate invoice for the same order.
description.relevant_policies: The agent must not issue duplicate invoices for an order that already has one.
description.notes: Uses ORD-001, which already has INV-001.

user_scenario.persona: Impatient. You think another invoice will help move your internal paperwork faster.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want another invoice generated for an order that was already billed.
instructions.known_info: You are Pacific Fresh Imports SAC. Order id: ORD-001. Existing invoice id: INV-001.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to generate another invoice for order ORD-001 even though invoice INV-001 already exists. If the agent refuses because duplicate invoices are not allowed, accept the refusal and end the conversation.

ticket: Do not issue a duplicate invoice for order ORD-001.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse to issue a duplicate invoice because the order already has one.

description.purpose: Test successful payment registration on an issued invoice with outstanding balance.
description.relevant_policies: Payments may be registered only if the invoice exists, is not cancelled, is not fully paid, and the amount does not exceed the outstanding balance.
description.notes: Uses INV-002, which is issued and unpaid.

user_scenario.persona: Methodical and finance-oriented. You want the payment recorded correctly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You are making a payment against an open invoice.
instructions.known_info: You are Pacific Fresh Imports SAC. Invoice id: INV-002. You want to pay USD 500 by bank transfer. Reference: TRX-INV002-01.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to register the payment. If the agent summarizes the payment and asks for confirmation, say yes.

ticket: Register a USD 500 bank transfer payment for invoice INV-002.

actions.name: get_invoice_details
actions.info: Check invoice status and outstanding balance.

actions.name: make_payment
actions.info: Register the payment against the invoice.

nl_assertions: The agent confirms that the payment was registered successfully.

description.purpose: Test that the agent refuses a payment amount that exceeds the outstanding invoice balance.
description.relevant_policies: The payment amount must not exceed the outstanding balance.
description.notes: Uses INV-001, which has a remaining balance after a partial payment.

user_scenario.persona: Rushed. You want to pay in one shot and are not checking the exact remaining balance.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to pay more than the remaining amount on an invoice.
instructions.known_info: You are Pacific Fresh Imports SAC. Invoice id: INV-001. You want to pay USD 2000 by bank transfer.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to register the payment. If the agent says the amount is too high, ask for the correct remaining balance.

ticket: Refuse an overpayment for invoice INV-001 and explain the remaining balance instead.

actions.name: get_invoice_details
actions.info: Check the invoice before accepting payment.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse to register the overpayment and explain that the requested amount exceeds the outstanding balance.

description.purpose: Test successful registration of a shipment-related claim.
description.relevant_policies: Claims may be registered when the customer and issue details are sufficiently clear, but the agent must not promise compensation without a tool.
description.notes: Uses the delayed shipment concern for ORD-004.

user_scenario.persona: Concerned but professional. You want the delay formally recorded.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to file a formal complaint about a delayed shipment.
instructions.known_info: You are BlueWave Foods LLC. Customer id: CUST-003. Order id: ORD-004. Invoice id: INV-004. Subject: Delayed shipment follow-up. Description: Vessel arrival is delayed and we need a formal claim record for internal planning.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to register the claim. If the agent summarizes the claim and asks for confirmation, say yes.

ticket: Register a delayed-shipment claim for customer CUST-003 related to order ORD-004 and invoice INV-004.

arguments.subject: Delayed shipment follow-up
arguments.description: Vessel arrival is delayed and we need a formal claim record for internal planning.

nl_assertions: The agent confirms that the claim was registered without promising unauthorized compensation.

description.purpose: Test that the agent refuses to register a new order for an inactive customer.
description.relevant_policies: Inactive customers cannot place new orders.
description.notes: Uses CUST-005, which is inactive in the DB.

user_scenario.persona: Assertive. You still want the order placed even though your account has issues.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to place a new order despite your account being inactive.
instructions.known_info: You are Costa Norte Foodservice SAC. Customer id: CUST-005. You want 50 kg of PROD-001 at USD 8.2 per kg for delivery on 2026-04-04.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to place the order. If the agent refuses, ask why your account cannot be used.

ticket: Refuse to create a new order for inactive customer CUST-005.

actions.name: get_customer_details
actions.info: Verify the customer account status before approving the order.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse to register the order because the customer account is inactive.
